response.overview: A performer is suddenly reassigned to the Queen. As Jane takes an active interest in the performers music, and tries to breakdown the barriers of hierarchy between them, they become more to each other than a performer and an audience. However, a sudden summon from the king puts this relationship in jeopardy as he informs the performer Jane is to be beheaded. Both, reluctant to lose what they have discovered in each other they must work together to plan an escape.
response.tagline: performer is suddenly reassigned to the Queen but what they find in each other is much more than an Audience and a performer.
response.title: Bella Donna
